modes.name: Team Deathmatch
modes.description: Classic high-frag rules of team vs team

modes.name: Kill Confirmed
modes.description: A twist on TDM where players must collect dog tags dropped by fallen enemies to score

modes.name: Domination
modes.description: Capture and hold three flag locations to accumulate point thresholds

modes.name: Search and Destroy
modes.description: One-life tactical rounds with alternating bomb planting and defusing

modes.name: Capture the Flag
modes.description: Objective tug-of-war mode for coordinated team play

modes.name: Demolition
modes.description: Objective mode featuring bomb sites for coordinated team play

modes.name: Team Defender
modes.description: Capture the flag to multiply point values earned by teammates

modes.name: Headquarters Pro
modes.description: Legacy objective mode featuring neutral capture areas

modes.name: Sabotage
modes.description: Legacy objective mode featuring movable bomb sites

modes.name: Ground War
modes.description: High-player-count playlist mixing large-scale Team Deathmatch and Domination

modes.name: Infected
modes.description: Survivors attempt to outlast infected players who convert targets upon a successful knife kill

modes.name: Drop Zone
modes.description: Teams fight to control a designated drop zone area that continuously rains down care packages

modes.name: Gun Game
modes.description: Players progress through a fixed sequence of weapon kills to win

modes.name: One in the Chamber
modes.description: Limited life pistol match where bullets are earned strictly via eliminations

modes.name: Juggernaut
modes.description: Combat encounters centered around heavily armored boss units

modes.description: Combat encounters centered around heavily armored boss units
